subject: fix(review): address 6 bugs found in code review of arc dedup
body:
Fixes found during comprehensive review of the semantic arc
deduplication implementation:

1. MergeReview.getArcLabel showed "Unknown → Unknown" because arc
   source/target are title strings (per import convention), not node
   IDs — use them directly instead of ID-based map lookup
2. SimilarityMatch.nodeId renamed to entityId — field was storing arc
   IDs in findTopArcMatches, misleading future consumers
3. DuplicateScannerModal merge step didn't clear prior error state —
   failed merges left stale error banners across attempts
4. ImportModal computing-embeddings error trapped user — added recovery
   UI with "Try Again" and "Continue Without Smart Matching" buttons
   when embedding computation fails after engine is ready
5. DuplicateScannerModal nodeMap rebuilt every render — wrapped in
   useMemo for performance
6. findSimilarPairs arcScore back-computation divided by zero when
   semanticWeight === 1.0 — guarded with conditional

Tags: review, bugfix, arc-dedup, import, scanner
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: semantic-duplicate-detection
Semver: patch

title: address 6 bugs found in code review of arc dedup
